title: Walker Chandiok is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Walker Chandiok is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Walker Chandiok is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Aurangabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Walker Chandiok:
Walker Chandiok is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walker Chandiok!
